message:
test(comparison): add synteny aligner tests and HGT island gap test

- Add synteny.test.ts with 4 tests covering:
  - Perfect synteny identification
  - Gap/mismatch handling
  - False positive prevention for numeric gene names (gp3 vs gp34)
  - Token intersection matching (terminase variants)
- Add HGT tracer test for island gap separation
